name: Lemon Meringue Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the sugar, cornstarch, and salt in a saucepan.
2. Stir in the lemon juice and cold water until well mixed.
3. In a medium bowl, beat the egg yolks.
4. Gradually add the lemon mixture to the egg yolks, stirring constantly.
5. Pour the mixture back into the saucepan and stir in the butter and boiling water.
6. Heat the mixture over medium-high heat, stirring constantly until it comes to a boil.
7. Reduce the heat to medium and continue boiling for 1 minute.
8. Stir in the grated lemon rind.
9. Pour the lemon filling into the prepared piecrust.
10. Beat egg whites and cream of tartar with an electric mixer on high speed until soft peaks form.
11. Gradually add sugar, beating until stiff peaks form.
12. Spread the meringue over the lemon filling, swirling the top and sealing to the edge of the crust.
13. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F (175°C) for 10-12 minutes, or until the meringue is golden brown.
14. Cool on a wire rack.
